name: Harden Domain Security Configuration for acmecorp.test
description: The acmecorp.test domain needs several security hardening measures applied through Virtualmin. Harden the domain by adding an SPF DNS record ('v=spf1 a mx ~all'), enabling DKIM signing for outgoing mail, and configuring the Apache website to redirect HTTP to HTTPS. Additionally, set the Apache security header X-Content-Type-Options to 'nosniff' and disable directory listing (Options -Indexes) for the web directory. Login credentials: root / GymAnything123!
